title: Mobile app crash fix — every screen must load
description: Mobile app login works and recipe loads but multiple pages crash. Systematically test every screen via ADB logcat, document status, fix every crash. Build one signed APK at end.

stories.title: Establish full route inventory and current TypeScript baseline
acceptanceCriteria: Complete list of every tab + stack route documented in progress.txt
TypeScript baseline captured: cd apps/mobile && npx tsc --noEmit output recorded
Confirmed cook-menu/[id].tsx does NOT exist (only cook-menu/[id]/ directory)
Confirmed cook/[id].tsx exists and is the only cook route file

stories.title: Install fresh debug/release APK on emulator and verify launch
acceptanceCriteria: ADB confirms emulator-5554 connected
App launches without immediate FATAL in logcat (clean launch)
Sign-in succeeds and lands on My Recipes tab

stories.title: Systematically test every tab screen and document crash status
acceptanceCriteria: Each of 6 tabs (index, search, scan, plan, menus, shop) navigated and tested via ADB
ADB screenshot captured for each tab
FATAL/AndroidRuntime errors captured per screen in progress.txt
Status (works/crashes) recorded for each tab

stories.title: Systematically test every stack screen and document crash status
acceptanceCriteria: Stack screens tested: recipe/[id], recipe/new, cookbook/[id], chef/[id], speak, plans, messages, modal, cook/[id], cook-menu/[id], menu/[id], menu/scan-dishes
ADB screenshots captured for each
FATAL/AndroidRuntime errors captured per screen in progress.txt
Status (works/crashes) recorded for each stack screen

stories.title: Fix every identified crash
acceptanceCriteria: Each crash root cause documented in progress.txt
Fix applied for each crash (component, import, data, navigation)
GapRequestCard, points system, community knowledge imports verified
expo-file-system v19 legacy import verified across mobile code
TypeScript still compiles cleanly after all fixes

stories.title: Build signed release APK with correct keystore and re-test all screens
acceptanceCriteria: Stale bundle deleted: rm -f android/app/build/generated/assets/createBundleReleaseJsAndAssets/index.android.bundle
android.enableJetifier=true present in gradle.properties
Release signing config present in build.gradle (reads keystore.properties)
Release APK built at apps/mobile/android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk
APK installed on emulator via adb install -r
All 6 tabs + all stack screens load without FATAL after install on the new APK
